reviews.review_description:
Loved it….even had a blast with it .
The movement can feel pretty restrictive  and dated but it didn’t bother me.
The atmosphere is great ,as is the music.
Level design is good, you feel lost in those dungeons but there are enough details to « show » you the way.
The last third of the game can be challenging but nothing impossible .
It is pretty dark and even feels like a survival horror game at some points.
Took me about 8/9 hours to finish.

Definitely recommend it!
This is a great game by a great studio
A great dungeon crawler with excellent atmosphere

Not for the swift spirited. Good dungeon crawler,very old school but in a fresh VR way. I love the health system and the unforgiving attitude of traps and falls.also love the sword play,very low energy and effective.

Very frustrating as menu is crazy…depicts a Xbox controller and how to use it for game movement and actions.  No mention of question 3 controller…trying to play with quest controller is simply annoying and frustrating.  Graphics are okay for price…shame about game play as game looks interesting. 😫😫😫

reviews.review_title: Should Have Used 3d Images for Textures.
reviews.review_description:
Should have used 3D images for the stone walls,  ceiling and floor textures !!!   Some of the later levels are way too dark. (Especially,  on the Quest 3.)
But, this is a very good game !
Upon loading you are stuck in a room & trapped in the floor. You can't move or select anything. Exactly as mentioned in one of the previous reviews. Shame as it's a great gane on psvr.

Great dungeon game. It has a fantastic atmosphere, which is also created by the good music and sound design. The graphics are decent, the enemies look good and are very well animated. The combat fits the style of the game - but it's not for players who want full immersion. It's indeed the combat system of a classic dungeon crawler, as well as the grid-based movement. The levels are diverse: some hidden areas, lots to collect, puzzles to solve, traps to avoid, enemies to fight, and much more.

Update for devs: Another save game worked for the dragon.

TLDR; A great classic dungeon game - a must for fans of grid-based movement. 4.5/5

reviews.review_title: It looked good for a second
reviews.review_description: It loaded one time looked cool but the settings didn't  work properly  and it would never Start again  don't know who to tell this to but It loads to a cell half In the  floor and does nothing but that only after several Uninstalls and over atemts ..still can't play because it won't start up properly..

developer_response.body: This is a he first time we have seen this, could you email support@psytecgames.com so we can work through the issue with you
